query: SELECT Global_Key__c, Id, Name, UserLicense.Name, PermissionsModifyAllData, PermissionsViewAllData, PermissionsManageUsers, PermissionsApiEnabled FROM Profile
query_v1: SELECT Id, Name, UserLicense.Name, PermissionsModifyAllData, PermissionsViewAllData, PermissionsManageUsers, PermissionsApiEnabled FROM Profile
description: Baseline user profiles and their system-level permissions

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, Id, Name, Label, IsOwnedByProfile, PermissionsModifyAllData, PermissionsViewAllData, PermissionsManageUsers, PermissionsAuthorApex, PermissionsCustomizeApplication FROM PermissionSet
query_v1: SELECT Id, Name, Label, IsOwnedByProfile, PermissionsModifyAllData, PermissionsViewAllData, PermissionsManageUsers, PermissionsAuthorApex, PermissionsCustomizeApplication FROM PermissionSet
description: All permission sets including system and administrative permissions

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, Id, DeveloperName, MasterLabel, Description, Status FROM PermissionSetGroup
query_v1: SELECT Id, DeveloperName, MasterLabel, Description, Status FROM PermissionSetGroup
description: Permission set groups used to bundle permission sets

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, PermissionSetGroupId, PermissionSetGroup.DeveloperName, PermissionSetId,  PermissionSet.Name FROM PermissionSetGroupComponent
query_v1: SELECT PermissionSetGroupId, PermissionSetGroup.DeveloperName, PermissionSetId,  PermissionSet.Name FROM PermissionSetGroupComponent
description: Maps permission sets included in each permission set group

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, Id, AssigneeId, Assignee.Username, PermissionSetId, PermissionSet.Name, PermissionSet.Description, PermissionSetGroupId FROM PermissionSetAssignment
query_v1: SELECT Id, AssigneeId, Assignee.Username, PermissionSetId, PermissionSet.Name, PermissionSet.Description, PermissionSetGroupId FROM PermissionSetAssignment
description: All permission set assignments including those originating from permission set groups

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, Id, Name, Username, Email, IsActive, ProfileId, Profile.Name, UserRoleId, LastLoginDate, CreatedDate, FederationIdentifier FROM User
query_v1: SELECT Id, Name, Username, Email, IsActive, ProfileId, Profile.Name, UserRoleId, LastLoginDate, CreatedDate, FederationIdentifier FROM User
description: All users with profile, role, and login metadata

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, ParentId, Parent.Name,Parent.Label, SobjectType, PermissionsRead, PermissionsCreate, PermissionsEdit, PermissionsDelete, PermissionsViewAllRecords, PermissionsModifyAllRecords FROM ObjectPermissions
query_v1: SELECT ParentId, Parent.Name,Parent.Label, SobjectType, PermissionsRead, PermissionsCreate, PermissionsEdit, PermissionsDelete, PermissionsViewAllRecords, PermissionsModifyAllRecords FROM ObjectPermissions
description: Object-level permissions granted via profiles and permission sets

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, ParentId,Parent.Name,Parent.Label, SobjectType, Field, PermissionsRead, PermissionsEdit FROM FieldPermissions
query_v1: SELECT ParentId,Parent.Name,Parent.Label, SobjectType, Field, PermissionsRead, PermissionsEdit FROM FieldPermissions
description: Field-level permissions granted via profiles and permission sets

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, Id, Name, ParentRoleId, ParentRole.Name FROM UserRole
query_v1: SELECT Id, Name, ParentRoleId, ParentRole.Name FROM UserRole
description: Role hierarchy used for implicit record access

query: SELECT Global_Key__c, Id, UserId, LoginTime, Status, SourceIp, Application FROM LoginHistory WHERE LoginTime = LAST_N_DAYS:7
query_v1: SELECT Id, UserId, LoginTime, Status, SourceIp, Application FROM LoginHistory WHERE LoginTime = LAST_N_DAYS:7
description: User login activity from the last 7 days
